case_title: PORCHIA LYTRISCHIA VS JOHNSON JEFF DBA JET HAND CAR WASH

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $337.29 FILED BY PORCHIA LYTRISCHIA AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON JEFF DBA JET HAND CAR WASH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
